Stand With Mark Kelly is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55.
For 2020, we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating Trump and turning Arizona blue. We recruited astronaut Mark Kelly to run for Arizona's US Senate seat, are working to win a key Arizona Congressional seat and to flip both houses of the Arizona State Legislature.
If you'd like to support the Stand With Mark Kelly Campaign, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4708/4bd7760e/4f35ed9d/77e1f748/802794378/VEsHDA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footerdmk?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=19+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190826_KellyBillboard_U35_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190826_KellyBillboard_U35_X3")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4708/4bd7760e/4f35ed9d/77e1f757/802794378/VEsEBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=20+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190826_KellyBillboard_U35_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190826_KellyBillboard_U35_X3")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4708/4bd7760e/4f35ed9d/77e1f756/802794378/VEsEBA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=21+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190826_KellyBillboard_U35_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190826_KellyBillboard_U35_X3")

name: Team de Blasio
subject: Video: what happened at the CNN town hall last night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
Americans without health insurance should be a thing of the past, and we're showing the way to the future.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e34/1630b3eb/517a7c47/5f54bc29/3835848614/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_townhall?refcode=712_org_em_fr")
Friend,
Putting working people first isn't always easy, but last night Bill showed a national audience how he's done it in New York City.
Take health care, where Bill went in the opposite direction of Donald Trump by guaranteeing quality care and a family doctor for any New Yorker who does not have insurance.
**[Watch Bill share how he's already implementing affordable health care for all New Yorkers, and contribute $1 to help turn last night's viewers into today's supporters.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e34/1630b3eb/517a7c47/5f54bc29/3835848614/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_townhall?refcode=712_org_em_fr")**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e34/1630b3eb/517a7c47/5f54bc29/3835848614/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_townhall?refcode=712_org_em_fr")
Donald Trump has spent his last three years trying to take away health care from millions and millions of Americans. But in New York City, Bill has done something very different: he's ensured everyone can access the care they need.
**[Americans without health insurance should be a thing of the past. Watch Bill's health care clip from the CNN town hall now and support this campaign.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e34/1630b3eb/517a7c47/5f54bc29/3835848614/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_townhall?refcode=712_org_em_fr")**
Bill's right: lacking access to affordable health care in the United States of America ought to be a thing of the past. In New York City, Bill's showing the country the way to the future -- and with your help, the nation will join us.
Thanks for helping to show the way,
Team de Blasio
[CONTRIBUTE»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e34/1630b3eb/517a7c47/5f54bc29/3835848614/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_townhall?refcode=712_org_em_fr")
---

PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e34/1630b3eb/517a7c47/5f54bc28/3835848614/VEsA/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e34/1630b3eb/517a7c47/5f54bc2f/3835848614/VEsB/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Campaign Update and "Cup of Joe on the Issues" events - 8/27/2019
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
Busy week in Iowa! Today, I'd like to highlight another upcoming **"Cup of Joe on the Issues" event** \- I'll speak on **agriculture and food** at **Cherry Glen Learning Farm, 3989 NW 94th Ave, Polk City, Iowa 50226** , on Thursday, August 29th, at 5pm CDT. You can RSVP [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9404217/92787779/459278524?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODYxNDdhNC1iNWM4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OnplfCBfmK2en8ZuoiDWvY5Hi2Iyo_cK9G8c_5l3rHA=).
All events for the coming week are below, and also [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9404218/92787780/-2096730744?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODYxNDdhNC1iNWM4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OnplfCBfmK2en8ZuoiDWvY5Hi2Iyo_cK9G8c_5l3rHA=).
**Tuesday, August 27th:**
* **Thompson, Iowa: **I will be speaking to Winnebago County Democrats on Tuesday, August 27th, at 6pm at The Branding Iron (135 Jackson St, Thompson, IA 50478).
* **Mason, Iowa: **I will be speaking to the Cerro Gordo County Democrats on Tuesday, August 27th, at 7pm (meeting starts at 6.30pm) at the Hy-Vee East (551 S Illinois Avenue, Mason City, IA 50401).

**Wednesday, August 28th:**
* **Muscatine, Iowa: **Hear me speak on education and training for a lifetime at the Strawberry Farm Bed & Breakfast in Muscatine, Iowa, on August 28th at 5pm CDT. RSVP here: [https://www.facebook.com/events/375630720016698/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9404219/92787781/665545713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODYxNDdhNC1iNWM4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OnplfCBfmK2en8ZuoiDWvY5Hi2Iyo_cK9G8c_5l3rHA=)

**Thursday, August 29th:**

name: Robert Foster
subject: Vote Today
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| It's Election Day, Mississippi. And our future is on the line.
Despite the attempts to discredit his integrity, character and selfless service, Justice Waller has stayed the course and avoided going down that road.
It's not who he is.
It's not what a leader does.
Instead, he's remained humbled and chosen to earn the trust of voters the hard way, by working hard and taking the high road - traits that provide a significant reason for me to cast a ballot for him today.
For me, this wasn't about who is most conservative or public opinion, but whom I trust to lead our state with integrity, character, and selfless service.
Three weeks ago, we saw that a majority of Mississippians are looking for more than the next-guy-in-line.
Today, we return to the ballot box to hire the candidate that will stand in the way of Hood turning our state blue, and I hope you will join me in voting for Bill Waller.
Every vote will count and turnout is critical.
Respectfully,
Robert

---

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Beachhead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
We've been in Iowa for most of the past two months, "**securing a beachhead** " and meeting as many people as we can. I've now visited 35 counties and shaken around 30,000 hands - and my team has distributed over 100,000 fliers across the state.
**And it's starting to show. Even on the front page.**
****
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9405548/92802126/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQ5YzgzNi1jMmM4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E3BG5Lpy3Xq9Doe0IJKpP0qXjSknChmEfe3HK7W5vM8=&refcode=em0827)
I know that nothing beats grassroots. **And we've been doing more than grassroots - our campaign is a "grass seeds" effort.**
Lately, I've been trying to visit every local paper and radio station I can, as I travel across Iowa. Because I know that, just as my mother did when I was a kid, **people trust their local paper first, as you see in this tweet from Dickinson County Democratic Chair Brett Copeland showing the value of our approach:**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9405549/92802129/-1703409291?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQ5YzgzNi1jMmM4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E3BG5Lpy3Xq9Doe0IJKpP0qXjSknChmEfe3HK7W5vM8=)**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9405550/92802133/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQ5YzgzNi1jMmM4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E3BG5Lpy3Xq9Doe0IJKpP0qXjSknChmEfe3HK7W5vM8=&refcode=em0827)
**I'm doing very well here in Iowa because I want to talk - and listen - to everyone.**
**But I need your help to take this campaign to the next level of TV and social media presence... so i****f you want a President who is accountable to you, and always working for you, please contribute!**
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9405552/92802136/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQ5YzgzNi1jMmM4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E3BG5Lpy3Xq9Doe0IJKpP0qXjSknChmEfe3HK7W5vM8=&refcode=em0827)
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9405553/92802139/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQ5YzgzNi1jMmM4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E3BG5Lpy3Xq9Doe0IJKpP0qXjSknChmEfe3HK7W5vM8=)

| | | | Hi Peter,

As the Congressional August recess comes to a close, we wanted to catch you up on what our campaign has been up to!

* * *
**_IN THE DISTRICT_**
Dan canvassed with volunteers in Western Springs and listened to residents' concerns about issues that included keeping our children and communities safe. Here he is knocking doors and talking to constituents about their views:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9411886/92865709/1208893105?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmNkNTI3NC1kY2M4LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=msetCMoYcM9S1Rr0q4C1AyFfThF8jCXYDw30JZrlaWY=&refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_190823_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I would like to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
---
Hi Peter,

I am sure that you have been getting many requests from campaigns, asking you to contribute a few dollars to help them for their end-of-month deadline. I'll admit, this is one of those emails, too.

**But, before I ask for your help, if you 'll give me a moment, I'd like to acknowledge and thank a few of the people who have generously contributed to our grassroots campaign this week:** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/oSNQwSQ5hZmS0_4ioXC2h71BTsR06hgtQXL2rPn8rU8=/Vxn6dLsXQMg6fledwBsvjUb1sP4BgT_mNnjN1N3bIBc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190827-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250) Running for Congress isn't easy. Asking you for help, for your time, and for your hard-earned money isn't easy. As such, it's so important to me that you know how grateful I am for your support and generosity. People like Marie, John, and William help us make our campaign possible.

People are tired of the same politics as usual, and in 2018, **we succeeded because we did things differently! We turned to real people, real families, and real grassroots supporters. I listened to people 's concerns. My team worked hard to build a tremendous network of supporters, and people like you were willing to believe in us, work with us, and help us win.**

Now I am working hard in Washington, and I am proud of my efforts, my work on behalf of people across Virginia, and my voting record. I refuse to play political games with issues that matter to Central Virginia families, like protecting access to health care, ending the culture of corruption in Washington, and improving our local economy. No matter how hard or challenging, I am going to continue working and fighting to make a difference.

[**I want to _maintain_ your trust and your support, Peter. That's why I don't take asking you for a contribution lightly. I hope that you will consider contributing toward our end-of-month fundraising goal tonight. We'll only be able to reach our goal with the support of folks like you. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oSNQwSQ5hZmS0_4ioXC2h71BTsR06hgtQXL2rPn8rU8=/Vxn6dLsXQMg6fledwBsvjUb1sP4BgT_mNnjN1N3bIBc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190827-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/oSNQwSQ5hZmS0_4ioXC2h71BTsR06hgtQXL2rPn8rU8=/Vxn6dLsXQMg6fledwBsvjUb1sP4BgT_mNnjN1N3bIBc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190827-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)
---
I truly appreciate your continued support, Peter.

Sincerely,

_Abigail_

* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oSNQwSQ5hZmS0_4ioXC2h71BTsR06hgtQXL2rPn8rU8=/mv9U_V9o0fdB2y7TglYfOYjWecJyDd_-vCPcH424WM0=?refcode=BLU-footer&recurring=true) Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Google's information dominance is dangerous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
Google is becoming a very powerful player in our politics. Have you seen this article I wrote for Fox News?
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dAFbi4_PWpXhfXhkMQZu936iHFkg0B5tktleNda64AmekGm2Rn7_Yclgh5Zk9Y15cU7kcMVEmrGMLC7SOKEUmrNzA5GPnJm4gbq3C8UWwVtlgIdQEIrUP1kQGKGZgoETPTBZ7nONrxz1d_fIXOS9RmIb95QJ5JfKVLqPWKJB-4BkP0CjuHS_TH00TU_MklgnfkIsIAEF8ruIraBRRunqXqBmphc5ihQv&c=7Ew9gvWIjNZX6Z04To9tTosBjrOK4TYVIV5h1eeDPdaae5NB43Fp_Q==&ch=WIL7YKRAnmKlJfRld6qlDTT4gg69mRHnfyUSr7h95k-erGJ3I06m5Q==)
---
| [Fox News](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dAFbi4_PWpXhfXhkMQZu936iHFkg0B5tktleNda64AmekGm2Rn7_Yclgh5Zk9Y15cU7kcMVEmrGMLC7SOKEUmrNzA5GPnJm4gbq3C8UWwVtlgIdQEIrUP1kQGKGZgoETPTBZ7nONrxz1d_fIXOS9RmIb95QJ5JfKVLqPWKJB-4BkP0CjuHS_TH00TU_MklgnfkIsIAEF8ruIraBRRunqXqBmphc5ihQv&c=7Ew9gvWIjNZX6Z04To9tTosBjrOK4TYVIV5h1eeDPdaae5NB43Fp_Q==&ch=WIL7YKRAnmKlJfRld6qlDTT4gg69mRHnfyUSr7h95k-erGJ3I06m5Q==), 08.21.2019

I can sum it up pretty quickly. Google is 100% biased against conservatives, and they've been lying about it for years. They have adjusted their algorithms to be biased against conservative news sites, foundations, and positive news headlines. We have seen internal communications showing employees' eagerness to punish conservative sites, limit their reach, and reduce their ability to advertise.
I encourage you to read the rest of the article, which details more instances of the incredible bias inside Google. The Democrats are happy to use election rigging tactics such as these to move the needle in their favor.
Our country is GREAT AGAIN and President Trump is doing an amazing job, but he needs our help NOW MORE THAN EVER!

clean_body: | | | | | | | Patriot, Google is becoming a very powerful player in our politics. Have you seen this article I wrote for Fox News? | == | ==, 08.21.2019 I can sum it up pretty quickly. Google is 100% biased against conservatives, and they've been lying about it for years. They have adjusted their algorithms to be biased against conservative news sites, foundations, and positive news headlines. We have seen internal communications showing employees' eagerness to punish conservative sites, limit their reach, and reduce their ability to advertise. I encourage you to read the rest of the article, which details more instances of the incredible bias inside Google. The Democrats are happy to use election rigging tactics such as these to move the needle in their favor. Our country is GREAT AGAIN and President Trump is doing an amazing job, but he needs our help NOW MORE THAN EVER! == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you, | | Matt Gaetz | | | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2019 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Tate Reeves
subject: This is it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
The polls are now open. I humbly ask for your vote in this critical election.
Everyone,
The runoff election is here. The polls are now open. I humbly ask for your vote in this critical election.

My team and I are working up till the last second to secure this win for the conservative movement, and I need your help now more than ever. Please, click on the link below to find your polling location if you don't know it and head in early to cast your vote.

[https://tatereeves.com/get-involved/election-center/](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=b26f5488d2c24561a38135dc609dfb88&_e=9BDsulMqaqir3_zujczqy_dFbqobYu2yvK-fBzuMWdoraGFWaGUIt6AB4DykeuEJDx4Lb6JZx1lMH5Y6UgHtz5-TcEOBQm7J8bsb--_J7m2Vq0EKePkyKUBVXQ6K8T_p5JwBvmzwE23CZGbhZLn4EAYRx6GHd25uWB-B7MgjqEjZ-3jQdSIuGZxhZdzHBEpBRStnKO3iTlyAntdHq1im8wwx6xtdep_Kd3qAGrYtXpW9CX2P_W-_XwINoRAUjRO6m9rKleNV-_6Ne5ecKyuLBFpj_JVg0ETBlwarlgPvVKs%3D)

Thank you for all your support thus far. Let's work hard to continue to keep Mississippi strong.

For Mississippi,

Tate Reeves

Thank you for everything you've done to build our movement -- I'm grateful down to my toes.

We're growing, and it's thanks to you, but we have a powerfully important new goal to hit before the end of August. That's why I'm about to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign before this week's fundraising deadline.

**This month, we released new plans and organized to reach communities in every corner of this country.

Hitting our August goal is how we keep doing this work -- door by door, family to family -- to create big, structural change. And the only way we're raising money on this campaign is through grassroots contributions from people like you.**

**[Everyone owns an equal piece of this movement, and every donation makes a difference on this campaign. So I'm asking: Can you please pitch in $3 today to help hit this goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529139/45c30650/12127606b/66876846/1509530604/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk2NkZfRU9NX0dSTV9FXzIwMTkwODI3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI66F_EOM_GRM_E_20190827_V1S2_P")**

---
>
By building a movement with grassroots donors, we'll win in 2020 and stop Washington from only working for the rich and powerful. And _how_ we raise our money is a big piece of that. It's been estimated that up to 70% of a congressional candidate's time is spent with potential wealthy donors -- trying to get them to give, or as a reward for doing so.

It's safe to assume that goes for presidential campaigns, too.

But on this campaign, we're doing things differently. I don't host any private fundraisers where you can only meet me if you can write a big check. That means I can spend time with our grassroots movement across the country. Just this month, I've met up with supporters at the State Fair in Iowa, on a giant field in the Twin Cities, in an auditorium in Los Angeles, and more.

We're spending our time taking selfies, doing pinky promises, and calling up grassroots donors. We're releasing plans -- for criminal justice reform and for our rural economy -- that tackle the problems we face head on, instead of just nibbling around the edges.

**If you ask me, that's what a campaign for president should be all about. Talking with people about real solutions to real problems. And getting organized at the grassroots level to make change happen.**

**But this type of campaign is only possible if everyone who is able pitches in what they can.**

**[Please make a contribution to our campaign before this week's end-of-month fundraising deadline, and let's keep building this incredible movement together.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529139/45c30650/12127606b/66876846/1509530604/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk2NkZfRU9NX0dSTV9FXzIwMTkwODI3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI66F_EOM_GRM_E_20190827_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: The House is villainizing Israel and moralizing terrorists
body:
| | Peter, It’s difficult to keep up with the torrent of anti-Israel news coming out of the House of Representatives. Two House Democrats, Rep. Illhan Omar and Rep. Rashida Tlaib have recently been the center of attention after being banned from Israel. By law, the nation lets in no one who supports the hate-based Boycott, Divestment and Sanctions movement (BDS). And these two congresswomen have been very clear about their anti-Israel agenda, working with organizations like Miftah, an anti-Semitic group that supports Palestinian terrorism against Jews. The fact that Congressional leaders in our nation are seeking to villainize Israel and moralize terrorists should shake us all to our core. **[If Christians don’t vote these leaders out of office in 2020, then an anti-Israel agenda will be deployed at the highest levels of government leading to devastating consequences for the Middle East and for Americans](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190827apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190827apl01nd&n=1).** This series of events - the rhetoric coming from House Leadership and Congressional representatives in D.C. - should unsettle every Christian, in every church in America. **If Christians don’t vote, we are ensuring an anti-Israel agenda becomes international policy throughout the world.** Failing to stand with Israel is equivalent to endorsing evil and throwing away God’s blessing for America. We must take action today. I’m asking you to donate towards our campaign to reach one million non-voting Christians in 2020 and equip millions more with voting information. **[Every dollar you give will be prayerfully used to help secure an America that stands with Israel](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190827apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190827apl01nd&n=2).** There are organizations working tirelessly to see leaders such as Rep. Omar and Tlaib stay in office, and send other anti-Israel leaders to Washington. Our nation is on the verge of being on the wrong side of history, and we cannot allow this to happen. I want to thank you in advance for any gift you give today toward our efforts to stand boldly with the nation of Israel and for biblical values. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190827apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190827apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190827apl01nd&n=4)

name: Margaret Good
subject: Welcome aboard!
body:
Dear friend,
Thank you for joining our campaign!

This campaign wouldn't be possible without grassroots supporters like you -- I'm so honored to have you on our team. Together, we can flip Florida's 16th District and elect representation that puts our values first each and every day.

Stay connected with our campaign on [**Facebook**](https://www.facebook.com/MargaretGoodFL) and [**Twitter**](https://twitter.com/GoodforFlorida)!

Thank you,
Margaret

clean_body: Hi Friend, First, thank you for all you have done for me! I am honored to represent your interests in the Mississippi legislature! Secondly, | | | | | | The Ragin' Cajun himself, James Carville, will be joining us Thursday! Get your tickets. | | | | Hi Friend, First, thank you for all you have done for me! I am honored to represent your interests in the Mississippi legislature! Secondly, I would like to personally invite you to an exciting event being hosted by the Mississippi Democratic Trust, a group dedicated to helping in Mississippi by electing more Democrats to the state legislature. | | | | Thursday, August 29thAlmanett Hotel & Bistro on the beachGulfport, MS6:00 P.M. | | | | | As an organization, The Mississippi Democratic Trust is thrilled to be hosting an event in coordination with our local candidates across the Gulf Coast -- Wendy McDonald and Inez Kelleher. Additionally, I will be joined by other special guests, Rep. David Baria, and Rep. Sonya Williams-Barnes. | | This will be a great way to kickoff an extremely important election in our state's history this fall. | | We are so excited to have James Carville join us this Thursday! Please consider being a sponsor of this incredible event. Your sponsorship makes it possible for us to allow more people to participate in the process and meet our candidates. If you can sponsor, I will immediately begin the process of adding you to the invite for our email and social media reminders. Additionally, we welcome all levels of giving for the event. Feel free to join us for $25, but please consider giving more. A donation of $100, $250 or $500 would help our candidates go up on TV, purchase radio commercials, buy billboards, and send out mailings. We have great candidates and they need your help! | | | | | | | | | | | Friend You can also donate to the event or share it with your friends on Facebook here: . I sincerely hope you can make it, and if you can't, please consider spreading the invitation to your family and friends! Thanks, | | | | Share Via: | | Created with Love it? | |

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Endorsement Alert!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
Virginia Farm Bureau Endorses Jill Vogel for State Senate
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

See our most recent endorsement. It is from the Virginia Farm Bureau and I am so proud to earn their support. Agriculture is at the core of what is important in our district and it is a key economic driver. Protection of agriculture and our precious resources will remain one of my highest priorities in the the legislature.

Virginia Farm Bureau Federation AgPAC endorses Senator Jill Vogel for 27th District Senate seat

Senator Vogel this week received the endorsement of the Virginia Farm Bureau Federation (VFBF) AgPAC, a political action committee of the Virginia Farm Bureau. "Farmers and farm communities are the backbone of the 27th district, and I will continue to be their voice in Richmond. I will work across the aisle to create opportunity and encourage innovation in Virginia agriculture."
Senator Vogel is among 126 candidates that Virginia VFBF AgPAC has endorsed for House and Senate seats. Endorsements were made based on the recommendations of local committees of farmers.
"Each of these candidates has demonstrated a clear understanding of the needs and challenges farmers are facing and/or have proven their support through their favorable voting records while holding positions in the General Assembly. We believe these candidates will help agriculture and forestry maintain its vitality as the number one industry in Virginia," said Wayne F. Pryor, chairman of VFBF AgPAC and VFBF president. "We look forward to working with them in the 2020 Virginia General Assembly."
The non-partisan VFBF AgPAC was created by Farm Bureau in 1999 and employs in-kind contributions to support candidates who can best support agriculture and Farm Bureau issues. A full list of candidates endorsed by the committee can be viewed online at vafb.com
---
|
---
| Sincerely,
---
| | |
---|---
|

Senator Jill Vogel

| |
---

clean_body: Rush a contribution now so we can build on this momentum and send Andrew to the White House. | | | | | Friend -- | BREAKING NEWS: A new Monmouth University poll has Andrew at 5% in the crucial early primary states -- ahead of candidates like Pete Buttigieg, Beto O’Rourke, and Cory Booker. With our critical August end-of-month deadline just a few days away, this poll could not be more important. It shows that if we have the resources to expand our campaign and talk to more voters we can build on this momentum and win. We have been outspent throughout this campaign, but we’re setting ambitious goals now that allow us to double our investments in organizing and ads in early states and close the gap. Let’s be clear: hitting this August goal -- or falling short -- will determine the future of this campaign. | Together we can win. Team Yang | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. | | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Khizr Khan
subject: insulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Not only did Donald Trump insult me and my wife after we spoke at the DNC convention... Not only did Donald Trump disrespect my fallen son... But Trump is fueling hate and tragedies across our great country. Hear me when I say this: **We must defeat Mitch McConnell 's Senate and restore power to Democrats. And Democrats have no shot to win without a victory in New Mexico.** My friend Ben Ray is up against a critical end-of-month deadline in 96 hours. He is way behind his goal -- he needs $3,793 in the next 96 hours. Can I count on your $15 to win New Mexico and kick McConnell out of office? | | **[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d6/18e32a7f/55dd2e8b/7bd79ee8/1787704490/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190827_em_fr_b1_khan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**

---

**[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d6/18e32a7f/55dd2e8b/7bd79eec/1787704490/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190827_em_fr_b1_khan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")**
---

Trump, McConnell, and their Republicans stand for putting children in cages, separating families, and raiding and arresting hardworking, law-abiding workers.

This election is our chance to stop these Republican attacks on the values of care and dignity inscribed in stone at the Statue of Liberty.

Thank you,

Khizr Khan

** **
** **
** **

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d6/18e32a7f/55dd2e8b/7bd79eed/1787704490/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d6/18e32a7f/55dd2e8b/7bd79ee2/1787704490/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d6/18e32a7f/55dd2e8b/7bd79ee3/1787704490/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d6/18e32a7f/55dd2e8b/7bd79ee0/1787704490/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d6/18e32a7f/55dd2e8b/7bd79ee1/1787704490/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d6/18e32a7f/55dd2e8b/7bd79ee6/1787704490/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

body:
Her campaign has reached the 130,000-donor threshold.

| | [](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjIwMDg1MjkS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTU5MzYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

| | | [**Time is running out until the DNC 's deadline for candidates to secure their spot on the debate stage, and we have fewer than 15,000 donors to go. No super PACs, no federal lobbyists, no corporate PACs--just us. Donate to help secure Kirsten's spot.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjIwMDg1MjkS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTU5MzYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

---

_DEADLINE: 1 day to go_
| Peter,

Tulsi Gabbard's campaign has crossed the 130,000-donor requirement to qualify for the next debate.

She's within striking distance of making the debate stage--if she does, she'll get to debate alongside Joe Biden, Cory Booker, Pete Buttigieg, Julián Castro, Kamala Harris, Amy Klobuchar, Beto O'Rourke, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Andrew Yang next month.

I want to be on that debate stage, too, sharing our brave vision for this country and refusing to let the conversation idle on reproductive rights and clean elections.

But I'll be frank: **The last day to qualify is tomorrow, and we don 't have the donors we need yet.**

Peter, we're _so close_. We can make this deadline--we just need everyone reading this email to step up.
---

Rush an immediate donation toward the DNC donor threshold and help secure my spot on the debate stage. There is zero time to waste--we need to make this deadline ASAP:
| If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [Donate $5](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjIwMDg1MjkS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTU5MzYxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

---

|
When I'm on that stage, I will be the fiercest fighter for the issues that matter to you and to this grassroots community: Reproductive rights. Getting money out of politics. A real, bold plan to address climate change.

**But I need your help to get there.**

Thank you for giving this all you've got.

--Kirsten

Gillibrand 2020 does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

name: Team Beto
subject: trying to get to 260,000
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
We've got a bit of good news
#
We've got a bit of good news, and a spot of bad news.
**First, the good stuff.** More than 200,000 people have donated to Beto’s campaign, placing our fundraising at the top of a competitive field. WOW! Thank you all for getting us this far.
**Now, what has us worried.** The first debate required 65,000 donors to be qualified. The second round required 130,000 donors. If they follow the same pattern, it’s highly likely that the next ones will require 260,000.
That means we might need another 60,000 donors to get on stage for the future debates. We don’t want to leave anything on the table.
[Can you make your first donation right now to Beto? Every donation, even if it’s just $1 or $5, helps us stay competitive in a big field.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30065?refcode=ema20190827-51485&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=51485%2E444211%2EiSs8-z)
**[Add a donation now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30065?refcode=ema20190827-51485&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=51485%2E444211%2EiSs8-z)**
The majority of our fundraising comes from emailing you, our top supporters. We don’t accept special interest money of any kind. Not from PACs, corporations, or DC lobbyists. So no one else is waiting around to help Beto make up the gap if we don’t get enough people to give over emails like this one. That’s why it’s so important.
[Add your first donation to Beto now to help us get to 260,000.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30065?refcode=ema20190827-51485&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=51485%2E444211%2EiSs8-z)
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=51485%2E444211%2EiSs8-z). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump and the G-7 – These are the Three Big Scores from Biarritz
body:
“This is the third G-7 meeting for President Trump, and by far, the best,” Rebecca Grant writes in Fox News. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=099cb7580e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump and the G-7 – These are the Three Big Scores from Biarritz**

“This is the third G-7 meeting for President Trump, and by far, the best,” Rebecca Grant writes in Fox News. “Before Trump became president, few noticed these meetings of Britain, France, Germany, Italy, Japan, Canada and the United States, which have been taking place since 1975.”

Topping the list of issues at the summit was Iran, where President Trump made his conditions clear: “No nuclear weapons, no ballistic missiles, and a longer timeline for a new Iran deal.” Thanks to cooperation at the G-7, the groundwork for progress toward Iran meeting those goals may be closer than ever.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df99227fc0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration announced last week it will terminate the Flores settlement agreement, a 1997 court decree that has prevented U.S. officials from detaining migrant families and unaccompanied minors for more than 20 days. Media coverage predictably—and inaccurately—warned of ‘indefinite detention’ for families and children caught crossing the southwest border,” John Daniel Davidson writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85bd1ac2ce&e=3ee4985eea). “But ending the settlement was the right call. More than any other single policy, it has created a magnet for illegal immigration, essentially guaranteeing entry to unaccompanied minors and any adult who crosses the Rio Grande with a child.”
---
|
---
| “President Trump got slammed by all sides for suddenly escalating his economic war with China on Friday. But for Americans who have lost a family member or friend to the Chinese-made street drug fentanyl, Trump’s harsh pivot is the right move,” Betsy McCaughey writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23c41cc325&e=3ee4985eea). “In the last three years alone, fentanyl and similar synthetic opioids manufactured in Chinese labs have killed some 79,000 Americans. That’s more than the American combatants killed in Vietnam, Afghanistan and Iraq combined.”
---
|
---
| “We live in the age of narratives, where propagandized storylines, not facts, matter. Leaked remarks from a recent town hall meeting that The New York Times hosted for its employees show how a mainstream newsroom today transitions from one anti-Trump smear to the next. When will the fake news end?” Jason Meister asks in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1bae7b9b10&e=3ee4985eea). Executive Editor Dean Baquet’s remarks make one thing clear: _The Times_ is deliberately trying out a new narrative in response to the discredited Russia collusion storyline.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ba3f0ce1d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d27f5bf1a4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=100ad6caaf)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Jim
subject: Updates from the campaign trail
body:
|
---
I have been working hard hitting the campaign trail to spread my vision for Mississippi out to every corner of the state.

Friend,
While the opposition has spent the last few weeks bickering in a contested runoff, I have been working hard hitting the campaign trail to spread my vision for Mississippi out to every corner of the state. Here are just a few of the highlights:
I spent the day after the primary in Jackson. My priority was to be in a public school, talking to educators about the issues that matter -- fully funding our public schools, teacher pay raises, tuition-free community college, and expanding pre-K statewide.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UPCqesIZWFHDXPLAYgAIlYHxA3MyuJVboBy5NGagGwI=/GYYCkn8IlKXOyzPA5itqgdO7XdfhyFRbs428JQKc4Ig=?refcode=20190827nd&amount=10) | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/UPCqesIZWFHDXPLAYgAIlYHxA3MyuJVboBy5NGagGwI=/GYYCkn8IlKXOyzPA5itqgdO7XdfhyFRbs428JQKc4Ig=?refcode=20190827nd&amount=10)
---|---|---
Last week, I went to a local family-owned grocery store in Indianola to talk about my plan to provide tax relief to working families by cutting the sales tax on groceries in half. For too long, politicians in Mississippi have been focused on handing out tax giveaways to large, out-of-state corporations while leaving working folks out to dry. If the state can manage to give out more than $210 million per year in giveaways to out-of-state corporations, we can make it easier for working families to put food on the table.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UPCqesIZWFHDXPLAYgAIlYHxA3MyuJVboBy5NGagGwI=/GYYCkn8IlKXOyzPA5itqgdO7XdfhyFRbs428JQKc4Ig=?refcode=20190827nd&amount=10) | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/UPCqesIZWFHDXPLAYgAIlYHxA3MyuJVboBy5NGagGwI=/GYYCkn8IlKXOyzPA5itqgdO7XdfhyFRbs428JQKc4Ig=?refcode=20190827nd&amount=10)
---|---|---
November might feel far off, but it's really just weeks away and we're not taking a single day for granted. Our campaign has made it this far because of supporters like you who believe in our plan to make Mississippi a better place for all.
**[Can you contribute today so we can keep our momentum strong into the general election?](https://act.myngp.com/el/UPCqesIZWFHDXPLAYgAIlYHxA3MyuJVboBy5NGagGwI=/GYYCkn8IlKXOyzPA5itqgdO7XdfhyFRbs428JQKc4Ig=?refcode=20190827nd&amount=10)**
On to November,
Jim
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/UPCqesIZWFHDXPLAYgAIlYHxA3MyuJVboBy5NGagGwI=/GYYCkn8IlKXOyzPA5itqgdO7XdfhyFRbs428JQKc4Ig=?refcode=20190827nd&amount=10)
---
|

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/UPCqesIZWFHDXPLAYgAIlYHxA3MyuJVboBy5NGagGwI=/3YenSD46Ll69zq_Iea_bN67GyivC32rpA8loO2SSaxI=). Friends of Jim Hood
P.O. Box 16647
Jackson MS 39236 United States
********** **********

---
We only have a few days left to hit our August fundraising goal. Meeting it will make sure we're able to grow this movement, increase the number of states we're organizing in, and share more big ideas to get our country working for working people.

**But even though the pressure is high, you won't see Elizabeth hopping around big cities to host swanky fundraisers with wealthy donors behind closed doors.**

You won't see Elizabeth take a dime from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. You won't see Elizabeth cozy up to billionaires and nudge them to dump buckets of cash into a Super PAC for her.

**Instead, grassroots donors are the only people who fund our campaign. And right now, our movement needs your help.

[Can you make a contribution to help hit our goal? Every new contribution that comes in will help hit this important August fundraising goal.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852916c/45c30650/126a6c9ef/668702ae/863534592/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk3MkZfRU9NX05GRl9DXzIwMTkwODI3X1YxUzFfUF9UMiJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI72F_EOM_NFF_C_20190827_V1S1_P_T2")**

>
Hitting this fundraising goal is just the first step of our plan to put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs -- not in the clutches of the rich and powerful.

We're proposing big plan after big plan to make big, structural change -- the type of change that rips out the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

Because let's face it: There are systemic problems that led to someone like Donald Trump getting elected in the first place. He's only the symptom, not the cause, of the crises we face.

To make real change, we need to build a massive grassroots movement, and we need bold ideas.

That's what we're focused on.

So instead of catering to wealthy and well-connected donors, Elizabeth will continue to spend time at meet and greets and organizing events. And she'll keep proposing substantive ideas that will level the playing field for working people.

Elizabeth's time is not for sale, and she's running to be the best president that money can't buy. But that's only possible because of the support from people like you.

**[So we have to ask: Can you chip in for the first time? Help hit our August fundraising goal so we can continue to grow this movement the right way.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852916c/45c30650/126a6c9ef/668702ae/863534592/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk3MkZfRU9NX05GRl9DXzIwMTkwODI3X1YxUzFfUF9UMiJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI72F_EOM_NFF_C_20190827_V1S1_P_T2")**

Team Warren

clean_body: Instead of catering to wealthy and well-connected donors, Elizabeth will continue to spend time at meet and greets and organizing events. | | | "" We only have a few days left to hit our August fundraising goal. Meeting it will make sure we're able to grow this movement, increase the number of states we're organizing in, and share more big ideas to get our country working for working people. But even though the pressure is high, you won't see Elizabeth hopping around big cities to host swanky fundraisers with wealthy donors behind closed doors. You won't see Elizabeth take a dime from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind. You won't see Elizabeth cozy up to billionaires and nudge them to dump buckets of cash into a Super PAC for her. Instead, grassroots donors are the only people who fund our campaign. And right now, our movement needs your help. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Hitting this fundraising goal is just the first step of our plan to put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs -- not in the clutches of the rich and powerful. We're proposing big plan after big plan to make big, structural change -- the type of change that rips out the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy. Because let's face it: There are systemic problems that led to someone like Donald Trump getting elected in the first place. He's only the symptom, not the cause, of the crises we face. To make real change, we need to build a massive grassroots movement, and we need bold ideas. That's what we're focused on. So instead of catering to wealthy and well-connected donors, Elizabeth will continue to spend time at meet and greets and organizing events. And she'll keep proposing substantive ideas that will level the playing field for working people. Elizabeth's time is not for sale, and she's running to be the best president that money can't buy. But that's only possible because of the support from people like you. "" Thanks, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: What we do between now and Saturday matters a lot.
body:
All eyes are on us.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de3/4bef7a87/682170e4/287f1773/3635908099/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
This Saturday, we're up against our end-of-August fundraising deadline. Here's why our performance between now and then matters _a lot_ :
Ours is one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Susan Collins' approval ratings are lower than ever, and our race was recently labeled a "toss-up" by _Cook Political Report._
**That means every quarter between now and Election Day, our fundraising numbers are going to be put under a microscope.**
We can't afford to fall short of our goals - _not even once._
So today, with just five days left before we close the books on August fundraising, I'm reaching out personally to ask for your help:
[**Make a $3 donation before our critical end-of-August deadline this Saturday at midnight. Help us finish out the month strong.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de3/4bef7a87/682170e4/287f1772/3635908099/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjctZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190827-full")
Your support - and your small-dollar donations - are what allows our campaign to keep moving forward. So thank you, and I really hope you'll consider making a donation before our Saturday deadline. Sara and I are counting on you.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de3/4bef7a87/682170e4/287f1772/3635908099/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjctZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190827-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de3/4bef7a87/682170e4/287f1771/3635908099/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de3/4bef7a87/682170e4/287f1770/3635908099/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Team Hick
subject: Thanks for joining the team.
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-launch?refcode=autoresp_signup)
Hey there,

Thanks so much for joining Team Hick!

John Hickenlooper has given his heart and energy to Colorado as a small business owner, as the mayor of Denver, and then as governor. Now, he’s ready to fight for Colorado in the U.S. Senate.

Now that you’re on the team, there are a few ways you can help us out right out of the gate:
1. The other side will do everything they can to hold on to this seat and keep their Senate majority. This campaign will accept no corporate PAC money—which means we’re relying on people like you to help us grow this grassroots movement. [**_If you can, chip in today to help bring real change to Washington and make the Senate work for us again.**_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-launch?refcode=autoresp_signup)

2. Follow us on [_**Facebook**_](http://www.facebook.com/johnhickenlooper), [_**Twitter**_](https://www.twitter.com/hickenlooper/), [_**Instagram**_](https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/), and [_**YouTube**_](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured) and keep us company on the campaign trail.

We’ll be in touch soon with updates. In the meantime, we’re thrilled you’re on the team!

Thank you,
Team Hick

#
**This morning, another Democrat – Stacey Abrams’s 2018 running mate – announced a campaign against me for U.S. Senate.**

Our end of month fundraising deadline is at 11:59 PM SATURDAY. **Another Democrat in the race means this deadline just became even more critical.**

[**Will you rush a donation right now to help us hit our goal?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2c5e1d3556&e=02cd889ad3)

| Radical Democrats know that their road to the White House and U.S. Senate majority runs through Georgia.

**If Democrats defeat President Trump and win the Senate, here’s what it means for America’s future:**
* Socialized medicine.
* Higher taxes.
* The $93 TRILLION “Green New Deal.”
* Open borders.

WE CAN’T LET THAT HAPPEN! I know we can win this, together, but only if we fight back NOW. [**I’m personally asking each of our supporters to chip in to help us hit our August fundraising goal.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=afebb01286&e=02cd889ad3)

Our Democrat opponents are looking for any signs of weakness, starting with our fundraising numbers. It’s absolutely critical that we keep up the momentum for our outsider movement, starting by hitting this month’s fundraising goal.

We must raise the resources it takes to win NOW. We must continue building the strongest grassroots team in Georgia’s history NOW. **We must continue to let each and every Democrat with their eyes on Georgia know that the road to socialism will NEVER run through Georgia!**

I know we can hit our goal for this month, and keep up the momentum for outsider movement, together.

[**Please, chip in now.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9494985d04&e=02cd889ad3)

David Perdue

name: Tim
subject: about that "damn bill"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Folks,

In the last democratic debate, I warned the proposed Medicare-for-All bill would take hard-earned, collectively-bargained health insurance away from union members and working families. Some of my colleagues disagreed with me, a hashtag was born, and even some T-shirts were sold. But nothing was truly resolved.

Until this past week in Iowa, as we gathered to speak before our brothers and sisters in labor. Those same colleagues who disagreed with my warning were now promising the union members gathered to speak with us that the Medicare-for-All bill would be fixed to ensure working families wouldn't lose their collectively-bargained health insurance.

Hopefully they give me a little credit for "writing the damn bill".

[**Our campaign has just moved the conversation about healthcare, the biggest issue of this primary. Now we need you to keep us in the game. Give just $3 to keep me in this race and on stage at the next debate so we can continue speaking on issues that matter to working families.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190827_1_1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Our+campaign+has+just+moved+the+conversa&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190827_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190827_1_1")

In order to beat Donald Trump in 2020 we need to make sure Democrats prioritize working families. I hope to be your nominee as we campaign to defeat Trump next November.

[**But I can 't stay in this race without your help. Please make a small contribution today to make sure our campaign and our voices continue to be heard.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190827_1_1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+But+I+canrsquot+stay+in+this+race+withou&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190827_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190827_1_1")

Tim

clean_body: | Folks, In the last democratic debate, I warned the proposed Medicare-for-All bill would take hard-earned, collectively-bargained health insurance away from union members and working families. Some of my colleagues disagreed with me, a hashtag was born, and even some T-shirts were sold. But nothing was truly resolved. Until this past week in Iowa, as we gathered to speak before our brothers and sisters in labor. Those same colleagues who disagreed with my warning were now promising the union members gathered to speak with us that the Medicare-for-All bill would be fixed to ensure working families wouldn't lose their collectively-bargained health insurance. Hopefully they give me a little credit for "writing the damn bill". "" In order to beat Donald Trump in 2020 we need to make sure Democrats prioritize working families. I hope to be your nominee as we campaign to defeat Trump next November. "" Tim | Paid for by Tim Ryan for America Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! name: Jaime Harrison
subject: Lindsey Graham + Steve King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdjh [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdjh]
Peter, I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign against Lindsey Graham and J.D. Scholten’s campaign in Iowa.
Please chip in $5 and keep reading below to see why these races matter so much: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdjh]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdjh]
J.D. Scholten is running against Steve King -- who The Washington Post called “the U.S. Congressman most openly affiliated with white nationalism.”
And I’m running against Lindsey Graham, who led the bitter fight to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.
J.D. and I will always stay focused on bringing us all together, not dividing us and tearing us apart.
But we’re up against two of the most divisive Republicans in Washington today, whose values are at odds with the people they represent.
So we’re joining forces to hit 500 donations today for our grassroots campaigns. Please, can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford right away? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdjh]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdjh]
I’ve seen the hatred, bigotry, and deep partisan divides that have been plaguing this country for far too long.
I believe that better days are ahead of us, but in order to get there, we need new, visionary leadership in this country.
It’s time for the people of this nation to stand up in the face of hatred. Stand up in the face of bigotry. And fight for those who have been left behind by people like Steve King and Lindsey Graham.
If you want a new generation of leadership who will always put the people first, then please chip in to send me and J.D. Scholten to Washington → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdjh]
Together, we really can make a difference.
-- Jaime Harrison
U.S. Senate Candidate
South Carolina

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

body:
If you haven't cast your vote yet, you need to go RIGHT NOW
Everyone,
The polls close in a few hours. If you haven't cast your vote yet, you need to go _RIGHT NOW_ to make sure you get there in time.

We have made it this far thanks to all of the hard work and dedication you have put in. Let's win this together for Mississippi.

Thank you for all your support.

Sincerely,

Team Tate

name: MichaelBennet.com
subject: re: Michael's explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Friends, we wanted to make sure you saw Michael's email last night.

He reached out to personally explain why he needs your help to send a strong message to the DNC and reach the October debate stage.

[**Take a minute to read his message below and make a donation to secure Michael 's spot in the October debate.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac15/134673f2/c4ead4d/6996593d/2543903717/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

| | [RUSH A DONATION NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac15/134673f2/c4ead4d/6996593c/2543903717/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
* * *
[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac15/134673f2/c4ead4d/6996593d/2543903717/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
Hi, Friends, I'll be upfront: [I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my presidential campaign. But first, let me explain](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac15/134673f2/c4ead4d/6996593d/2543903717/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")[:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac15/134673f2/c4ead4d/6996593d/2543903717/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Because of arbitrary rules cooked up in a backroom at the DNC, I will not be on stage during the September debate.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac15/134673f2/c4ead4d/6996593d/2543903717/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

The DNC is stifling debate at a time when we need it most. These rules have created exactly the wrong outcomes and they will not help us beat Donald Trump.

_Our fight is far from over._

I won't be stopped by the DNC's unprecedented and counterproductive process that rewards celebrities, billionaires who can buy their way in, and perma-candidates who have been running for decades.

[I am staying focused on what matters most:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac15/134673f2/c4ead4d/6996593d/2543903717/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") [talking to voters and beating Trump.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac15/134673f2/c4ead4d/6996593d/2543903717/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

This campaign has never been about being center stage.

It's about building the kind of country that our children deserve. Not one that separates families, or underfunds schools, or refuses to protect our planet.

As a senator from a purple state, I've never known an easy election.

I've spent my time in office listening to the diverse voices of my constituents and working toward ambitious and durable solutions to our greatest challenges.

If we're going to beat Trump -- that's the kind of leadership we need in 2020.

There's too much at stake to back down now.

[If you're with me, will you donate any amount to help me get to the next debate in October?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac15/134673f2/c4ead4d/6996593d/2543903717/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Send the DNC a message that the voters decide our nominee -- not some operatives in a backroom.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac15/134673f2/c4ead4d/6996593d/2543903717/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

clean_body: | | | Friends, we wanted to make sure you saw Michael's email last night. He reached out to personally explain why he needs your help to send a strong message to the DNC and reach the October debate stage. "" | | "" * "" Hi, Friends, I'll be upfront: "" "" "" The DNC is stifling debate at a time when we need it most. These rules have created exactly the wrong outcomes and they will not help us beat Donald Trump. Our fight is far from over. I won't be stopped by the DNC's unprecedented and counterproductive process that rewards celebrities, billionaires who can buy their way in, and perma-candidates who have been running for decades. "" "" This campaign has never been about being center stage. It's about building the kind of country that our children deserve. Not one that separates families, or underfunds schools, or refuses to protect our planet. As a senator from a purple state, I've never known an easy election. I've spent my time in office listening to the diverse voices of my constituents and working toward ambitious and durable solutions to our greatest challenges. If we're going to beat Trump -- that's the kind of leadership we need in 2020. There's too much at stake to back down now. "" "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you, Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: Dan Baer
subject: Re: Cory Gardner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
|
---

| | In 1994, Congress passed a landmark law called the Violence Against Women Act (VAWA). It took important steps to combat violent behavior and domestic abuse against women by giving law enforcement the resources to track down and apprehend serial abusers, prohibiting those abusers from possessing guns, strengthening penalties against domestic violence and funding community organizations to support victims. In 2000, 2005 and 2013, Congress reauthorized VAWA. With President Obama's support, VAWA was updated and improved in 2013 to expand protections to LGBTQ individuals, undocumented immigrants and people on tribal lands. VAWA is up for reauthorization in 2019, and the U.S. House passed a much-needed update this spring (VAWA 2019). But this bill hasn't become law. It's stuck in the Republican-controlled U.S. Senate, where Colorado's Sen. Cory Gardner is helping block it from coming up for a vote. Here's why: VAWA 2019 includes a much-needed update to close the "boyfriend loophole." While earlier versions of VAWA prohibited gun possession by domestic abusers who are married to, live with or have a child with their victim, VAWA lacked enforcement provisions and protections for women who are abused by dating partners. The need to close the "boyfriend loophole" is clear. In 2019, unmarried women are equally likely to be killed by their dating partners as married women are by their spouses. And the solution is straightforward. VAWA 2019 empowers law enforcement to confiscate guns from domestic abusers and stalkers, including boyfriends or dating partners. It stands to reason that when single women face the same risks and should be entitled to the same protections as married women, VAWA 2019 should pass easily in the U.S. Senate. Unfortunately, Republican Majority Leader Mitch McConnell refuses to put VAWA 2019 up for a vote. McConnell, who has dubbed himself the "Grim Reaper" of progressive legislation, has banished it to what he calls his "legislative graveyard," where other much-needed reforms have gone to die. McConnell's refusal to consider VAWA 2019 is morally reprehensible, and his jokes about graveyards are stunningly disrespectful to victims and their families. But Coloradans should expect their Sen. Cory Gardner to stand up to McConnell and call for an immediate vote on VAWA 2019. Instead, Gardner dismissed efforts to pass VAWA 2019 as "playing politics." Why would Cory Gardner refuse to stand up for Colorado women and support VAWA passage? Because the National Rifle Association (NRA) is opposed to closing the "boyfriend loophole." The NRA has taken the position that it doesn't matter whether gun buyers are law-abiding or domestic abusers, that a sale is a sale, and preventing abusive boyfriends from buying assault rifles is bad for business. So, for the first time, the NRA is "scoring" VAWA 2019. This means if Gardner votes for VAWA he will receive a demerit for voting against interests of the corporate gun lobby, and he could lose his "A" rating on the NRA's report card. But Cory Gardner depends on the NRA to get re-elected. He is one of the top five recipients of NRA money in the entire U.S. Congress, to the tune of nearly $4 million in campaign cash. So Gardner opposes VAWA 2019. He would prefer not to cross the NRA, even with tens of thousands of Colorado women who are victims of domestic abuse every year at risk of further harm. This is an appalling example of the corrosive effect of corporate money in politics. Courageous community organizations like the Colorado chapters of the Coalition Against Sexual Assault and Moms Demand Action for Gun Sense in America, and Colorado Ceasefire are calling for a vote on VAWA re-authorization. They're urging the U.S. Senate to immediately pass VAWA 2019, and pressuring Gardner to do the right thing for Colorado women and families. They deserve our support. And next fall, we will have to elect leaders who will refuse to accept corporate PAC money, who will stand their ground to fight for action on gun safety. To do that, we'll have to replace captured career politicians like Cory Gardner with independent public servants who haven't been bought by the gun industry. If you also believe that the Senate must immediately take action to pass VAWA 2019, [please share the published version of this op-ed](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f7/232dfd1/9fc63d7/62a13178/1410381368/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://coloradosun.com/2019/08/27/gun-violence-cory-gardner-senate-politics-opinion/"), which first ran in The Colorado Sun on 8/27, on social media with your friends and family. Thanks! \--Dan |
---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f7/232dfd1/9fc63d7/62a13179/1410381368/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f7/232dfd1/9fc63d7/62a1317e/1410381368/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f7/232dfd1/9fc63d7/62a1317f/1410381368/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---
If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f7/232dfd1/9fc63d7/62a1317c/1410381368/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/fewer-emails"). We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f7/232dfd1/9fc63d7/62a1317d/1410381368/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe").

| | Paid for by Dan for Colorado

---

name: Ed Markey
subject: He didn't even bother to show up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| **G7: Trump skips talks on climate crisis and Amazon fires**
Hello - When world leaders recently gathered to identify global solutions to to combat the climate crisis, President Donald Trump was nowhere to be seen.

Our climate-denier-in-chief couldn't even be bothered to show up for a meeting.

But while Trump and the GOP continue to bury their heads in the sand and deny climate change, we're mobilizing a grassroots movement to save our planet and grow our economy.

_**[SIGN ON: Tell President Trump that we will not back down from fighting climate change!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc16/693b8b0a/45862e87/72de9ccc/2425760182/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/i-support-the-green-new-deal?source=082719_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")**_

New polling shows that the American people support the Green New Deal.

> ➜ 63% of adults nationwide think the proposal is a good idea.
>
> ➜ 60% of registered voters support it.
>
> ➜ 86% of Democrats and 64% of Independents are in favor of the plan.
But Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and President Trump are dug in and will do everything they can to stop the Green New Deal.

That's why we must turn up the pressure and show the GOP that we will not back down from this fight.

_**[Sign our petition and tell President Trump that you're in this fight to combat climate change!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc16/693b8b0a/45862e87/72de9ccc/2425760182/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/i-support-the-green-new-deal?source=082719_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")**_

Thanks,

Ed
