name: Team Beto
subject: Beto shows us what clarity looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Team Trump is attacking Beto for saying he supports a woman’s right to choose FULL STOP. Can you help us send a message to Trump?
#
TEAM TRUMP ATTACKS BETO Team Trump is attacking Beto for saying he supports a woman’s right to choose full stop. [Can you help us send a message to Trump?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20190827-51520&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=51520%2E444211%2EDdGnV0) **[Rush a $3 donation](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20190827-51520&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=51520%2E444211%2EDdGnV0)**
---
An anti-choice activist confronted Beto in Charleston. Now Trump’s campaign is spreading the video around as an attack. **We need your help to respond, but first let us explain what happened.**
An activist in the crowd at Beto’s event tried to ask a “gotcha” question:
_“I was born September 8th, 1989. I want to know if you think on September 7th, 1989 that my life had no value.”_
**What happened next is typical for Beto.** He gave a compassionate answer without at all equivocating on his support for a woman’s right to choose. Full stop.
Now Team Trump is attacking us online trying to spread the video around with the hashtag “#RadicalDemocrats.”
[Can you donate $3 to send a message to Trump that Beto’s unequivocal support for a woman’s right to choose is only going to strengthen this campaign?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20190827-51520&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=51520%2E444211%2EDdGnV0)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20190827-51520&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=51520%2E444211%2EDdGnV0)**
Beto’s shown us for the umpteenth time what it looks like to stick up for principles without equivocation, and to do so while being compassionate towards the people who disagree with us.
But sticking up for your principles means we’re not going to be spared from attacks from Team Trump. [Please make a $3 contribution to help us send Team Trump a message today.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20190827-51520&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=51520%2E444211%2EDdGnV0)
Thank you,
Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=51520%2E444211%2EDdGnV0). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

subject: 10 weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
We're exactly 10 weeks out from Election Day. National pundits have this race as a Toss-Up.
|
---

| | |
---

Peter, we're exactly 10 weeks out from Election Day.

**_Two_** polls released in the last week have Andy and Jacqueline in the lead.

National pundits have this race as a Toss-Up.

So Matt Bevin and his out-of-state backers are going to pour big $$$ into increasingly nasty, negative ads to try and cling to power.
**To stay competitive with Bevin 's big money, we need 1,000 grassroots donors to chip in $10 in the next 24 hours.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: In photos: First Lady Melania Trump’s visit to France
body:
Over the weekend, First Lady Melania Trump traveled across the Atlantic with President Donald J. Trump to attend the 45th G-7 Summit. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3360267bdf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 27, 2019
---
| | |
# **In photos: First Lady Melania Trump’s visit to France**

**Over the weekend,** First Lady Melania Trump traveled across the Atlantic with President Donald J. Trump to attend the 45th G-7 Summit. While in France, Mrs. Trump participated in several spousal events hosted by Mrs. Brigitte Macron, wife of French President Emmanuel Macron.

[In photos: First Lady Melania Trump visits with youth surfers on the French coast.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06c6aad41f&e=3ee4985eea)

**On Sunday,** Mrs. Trump accompanied Mrs. Macron and other G-7 spouses for a walking tour of Espelette, France. During the trip, the U.S. First Lady visited several charming shops, including a fabric store, a traditional bakery, and a regional grocery store before stopping by a nearby pepper field to meet with a local farmer and learn more about the region’s agriculture.

**Before departing,** Mrs. Trump traveled to Côte des Basques Beach on Monday for a surfing demonstration and a youth biodiversity presentation. The young surfers joined her and the other spouses on the shoreline for a brief introduction to surfing. For the biodiversity presentation, the First Lady was escorted to three displays by a youth member to learn more about their marine life and environmental conservation projects.

**“Mrs. Macron** was a gracious host, showing us around some of France’s most beautiful and charming villages and towns,” Mrs. Trump said.

**“The G-7** is a great opportunity for the spouses and partners to come together on a global stage to further engage in our discussions for the future of our youth and to enhance our relationships with one another.”

**Watch:** [The President and First Lady attend the G-7](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=293f177f5f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **From the G-7, President Trump secured a billion dollar trade deal **

**Coming soon **is a huge trade agreement with Japan worth billions of dollars to American businesses. President Trump announced the new deal over the weekend alongside Prime Minister Shinzo Abe of Japan.

**The new deal** is both a win for America and greatly strengthens ties with one of our largest trading partners. More market access has been secured for our agricultural goods and, importantly, Japan will be buying up large sums of corn from American farmers. The agreement also makes significant progress on digital trade and will greatly reduce tariffs on industrial products.

**“This is a tremendous deal** for the United States,” President Trump said. “It’s a really tremendous deal for our farmers and agricultural ranchers.”

[G-7 summit: Trump strikes 'billion-dollar' trade deal with Japan](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a15ad8bb2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump depart a G7 Summit press conference at the Centre de Congres Bellevue in Biarritz, France** | August 26, 2019
---
|

Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

While we all know this is a dangerous and foolish idea, the Preside | | "" While we all know this is a dangerous and foolish idea, the President does not. And he brings it up again and again because no one around him has the courage to tell him it 's crazy. We need to have people who understand the basic principles of science in the rooms where decisions are being made. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Just look at the way Trump's top advisors responded to his absurd idea of bombing hurricanes: "" And while Trump is suggesting we unleash nuclear weapons on natural disasters that are becoming more frequent and more intense due to climate change -- He's been outright HOSTILE to any effort to address our climate crisis: "" Right now, it's URGENT that we elect more scientists to the House and Senate in 2020 to reverse course on this administration's reckless climate policies. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you, 314 Action Rapid-Response Team | "" | | Paid for by 314 Action Fund, "", not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. 314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. name: AOC JUST said...
subject: what we MUST do [to make sure we win in 2020]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | AOC is speaking the truth. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - AOC is speaking the truth: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06eb/72412298/403aad1d/610291ff/2112062604/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1") [**Peter, we believe in one person, one vote -- which means that we MUST abolish the Electoral College to protect our democracy. Add your name if you agree >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06eb/72412298/403aad1d/610291fe/2112062604/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+firstnameFriends+we+believe+in+one+perso&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1") | | | [SIGN ON >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06eb/72412298/403aad1d/610291e1/2112062604/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+ON+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1")
---
In 2016, Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly THREE MILLION VOTES -- but lost the election anyway because of an outdated system that weighs rural voters above those in cities.
_**National Republicans will never agree to abolish the Electoral College, because they 've only won the popular vote twice since 1988.**_
[**We can 't let Trump get re-elected while only winning the electoral college again -- we need to mobilize NOW to abolish this dangerously undemocratic system. Sign on today >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06eb/72412298/403aad1d/610291e0/2112062604/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+We+canrsquot+let+Trump+get+reelected+whi&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1")
| | [ABOLISH >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06eb/72412298/403aad1d/610291e3/2112062604/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+ABOLISH+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190827_AOC_U1_X1")

We NEED to protect the integrity of our democracy.
\-- Voter Protection Project

clean_body: Not just the same ideas of the past. | | | | | | The Hill : Bernie Sanders criticizes Yang's universal basic income proposal Help us respond and fight back: | | With Andrew rising in the polls and our momentum growing, we knew the attacks could start at any time. And friend, they’re here. Just this morning, Bernie Sanders launched an attack on Andrew’s proposal for universal basic income. Bernie’s criticism is a red flag to everyone on this team who sees the crisis we’re facing and wants real action -- not just the same ideas of the past. Your support is more important than ever in this moment. Bernie’s attack is likely just the start of what’s to come from other candidates and special interests. And these attacks will only intensify as our poll numbers increase and we get closer to the September debate. Can we count on you to rush a contribution before midnight so we have the resources to respond to this attack and keep our momentum? We’re counting on this team to step up in this important moment: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | We know universal basic income is the best way forward in an economy that’s rapidly transforming because of automation and technology -- and that Andrew is the only candidate ready to address the crisis we’re facing. We cannot let his important message get drowned out. | Thank you for fighting back, Yang2020 | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

We've got just a few days left before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and here's the thing: we're short of where we need to be.

**It's powerfully important that we hit our August goal. These milestones are how we set budgets for opening new offices, hiring more organizers, hosting town halls, and more.**

[**Specifically, we've got an important target: 10,000 new donors by the end of the week. That's what we'll need to hit our August goal. clean_body: We've got just a few days left before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and here's the thing: we're short of where we need to be. | | | "" We've got just a few days left before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and here's the thing: we're short of where we need to be. It's powerfully important that we hit our August goal. These milestones are how we set budgets for opening new offices, hiring more organizers, hosting town halls, and more. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" We're proud of where this movement is right now, and we need real resources to keep growing -- to make all of the investments needed to win this race and build a lasting movement for big, structural change. Reaching this month's goal is the next step in our plan, and a necessary one. We're counting on grassroots donors chipping in for the first time to step up and power this movement. "" Thanks again for all you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

name: Team Weld
subject: nuke hurricanes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARy7llf2iME2D7yWFjksJFVc&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190827_fr&n=1) We couldn’t believe our eyes, Friend. But yes, this headline was — in fact — real. ⬇️ [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARy7llf2iME2D7yWFjksJFVc&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190827_fr&n=2) How does this make you feel about Donald Trump having his hands on our nation’s nuclear codes? **Yeah, we don’t feel so great about it either.** Our country has so many pressing matters that need our president’s attention — a burgeoning deficit, an immigration system desperately in need of reform, and infrastructure that is crumbling beneath our feet — and yet, this is what President Trump occupies the government’s time with? _What a waste._ That’s why we’re in this race. **We need a leader in the Oval Office who is going to spend our time solving the most pressing issues of our generation.** [**Can you help us elect the leader that our country deserves by rushing a contribution of $10, $20, or whatever you can today?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARy7llf2iME2D7yWFjksJFVc&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190827_fr&n=3) — Team Weld | | [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARy7llf2iME2D7yWFjksJFVc&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190827_fr&n=4)
---
Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.weld2020.org/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190827_fr&n=5).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190827_fr&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190827_fr&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190827_fr&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Booker HQ
subject: Cory's waiting to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, We want your voice to be counted in our official debate survey: **[Let Cory know what issues matter the most to you -- and any advice you have for him as he prepares for the third debate.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190827_BHQ_20190827-su-BHQ-debateprep-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We're only one day away from the DNC securing the debate stage lineup. This will be the first time the frontrunners of this race are debating the issues on stage together. And as one of our top supporters, Cory needs to hear from you. **[Will you take two minutes to take our debate stage survey before midnight tonight?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190827_BHQ_20190827-su-BHQ-debateprep-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Can't wait to share these with Cory,
Booker HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ I know it's hard to believe, but it's already time to start preparing for the next DNC debate -- and I need your help. Friend, time is running out, and I want to hear from you. **[Can you take two minutes to fill out my debate stage priority survey? This is the most effective way to have your thoughts shared directly with me and our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190827_BHQ_20190827-su-BHQ-debateprep-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190827_BHQ_20190827-su-BHQ-debateprep-actives_actives_button1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I've been on the trail for over six months -- talking to folks all across the country about what matters to them, hearing stories and ideas, and bringing their priorities to the forefront of this campaign. I've heard from people about the need to confront the existential threat of climate change and how we're going to address it as a country. And I've heard how we must combat white supremacy, implement gun violence prevention reforms, and stand up for reproductive rights. **[But this is only the start. With only two days left until the September debate stage is finalized, I want to hear directly from you. What issues do you most want to hear about in the next debate?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190827_BHQ_20190827-su-BHQ-debateprep-actives_actives_l4&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** One of the founding principles of this grassroots campaign is that everyone deserves to have their voice heard. And that includes you. When I step onto that stage in a few weeks, I want to be ready -- and with your help, I will be. Thank you for your help,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=eem_su_20190827_BHQ_20190827-su-BHQ-debateprep-actives_actives_button2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b64/5fca0d19/73d52347/29194196/1767530013/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b64/5fca0d19/73d52347/29194195/1767530013/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b64/5fca0d19/73d52347/29194194/1767530013/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b64/5fca0d19/73d52347/29194193/1767530013/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b64/5fca0d19/73d52347/29194192/1767530013/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b64/5fca0d19/73d52347/29194196/1767530013/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").
